_note: Rubric from sentinel/fixtures/debug-test/expected-findings.md. Default mode (no --flake/--drift): the root cause is a missing `await` on a Playwright web-first assertion, caught at Step 2 (quick QA heuristics) → 🟢 High confidence + a local fix, NO routing to the Playwright healer or diagnosing-bugs. `anchors` exist only for the offline heuristic judge; the LLM judge grades `claim` directly.

must_surface.claim: Root cause is a missing `await` on a Playwright web-first (async, auto-retrying) assertion.
Explains the consequence: unawaited, the assertion is a floating promise that never settles, so it can never fail (false positive).
Proposes the fix: await the assertion — `await expect(banner).toBeVisible()`.

must_not.claim: Must NOT route to the Playwright healer — this is not a locator/selector/timeout error.
Must NOT route to diagnosing-bugs — the quick heuristics resolve it at Step 2.
